static_tests.description: Pure Python unit tests, no Excel dependency
static_tests.command: python -m pytest tests/test_cf_engine.py tests/test_roster_log_review_queue.py tests/test_patcher.py tests/test_xlsx_utils.py tests/test_dv_engine.py tests/test_roster_parser.py -q
static_tests.when: always safe, run on every change

ci_gate.description: Full CI artifact engine tests (matches GitHub Actions workflow)
ci_gate.command: python -m pytest tests/test_cybernet_targets.py tests/test_nw_prj_neuron_track_hours.py tests/test_nw_prj_neuron_track_hours_bonita.py tests/test_admin_billing_summary.py tests/test_one_marcus_recon.py tests/test_one_marcus_generate.py tests/test_one_marcus_immutability.py tests/test_sidecar_html_portal.py tests/test_artifact_compare.py tests/test_roster_log_compare.py tests/test_same_family_compare.py tests/test_gitignore_hygiene.py tests/test_roster_log_review_queue.py -q

imports_check.description: Verify all artifact engine modules import cleanly
imports_check.command: python -c "import triage.cybernet_targets.cli; import triage.nw_prj_neuron_track_hours.cli; import triage.nw_prj_neuron_track_hours.bonita_cli; import triage.admin_billing_summary.cli; import triage.one_marcus_recon.cli; import triage.sidecar_html; import triage.artifact_fingerprint; import triage.artifact_profiles; import triage.artifact_compare; import triage.same_family_compare; import triage.roster_log_compare.compare; import triage.roster_log_review_queue.cli; import triage.gitignore_hygiene; print('imports ok')"

ooxml_gate_checks.description: Run gate_checks on a specific xlsx to detect structural hazards
ooxml_gate_checks.command: python -c "from triage.gate_checks import run_gate_checks; import json; print(json.dumps(run_gate_checks('PATH_TO_XLSX'), indent=2))"
ooxml_gate_checks.when: after generating or repairing a workbook

excel_recovery_check.description: Detect if Excel shows repair dialog (uses PowerShell Get-Process)
excel_recovery_check.when: after opening xlsx in Excel Desktop

web_excel_compatibility.description: Run web Excel compatibility rules check
web_excel_compatibility.command: python -c "from triage.web_excel_compatibility_rules import inspect_web_excel_package; import json; print(json.dumps(inspect_web_excel_package('PATH_TO_XLSX'), indent=2))"
web_excel_compatibility.when: after generating a workbook, before delivery

stop_ship_scan.description: Scan xlsx for stop-ship tokens in XML parts

dxf_schema_order.description: Verify OOXML dxfs schema order in styles.xml
dxf_schema_order.command: python -c "from triage.cf_engine import _patch_styles_dxf; from pathlib import Path; import zipfile; zf=zipfile.ZipFile('PATH_TO_XLSX'); styles=zf.read('xl/styles.xml').decode(); result=_patch_styles_dxf(styles, []); print('dxfs' in result and 'cellStyles' in result)"

artifact_fingerprint.command: python -c "from triage.artifact_fingerprint import fingerprint; import json; print(json.dumps(fingerprint('PATH_TO_XLSX'), indent=2))"

test_fixtures.tests/fixtures/roster_log_review_queue/: Roster log review queue test fixtures

known_test_failures.tests/test_billing_regression.py: TEST_STACK_UNDOCUMENTED - requires attached_assets/ reference xlsx paths not shipped
